## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SEO priorities, review metrics, and align on action items for improving content performance and tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 new articles to be published this week, covering backlog from last week](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Need to implement tracking for conversions (demo bookings, free trials) from SEO traffic](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Top performing articles: "short form video" (2000 clicks), "vertical video" (1200 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Lead magnets being created for top-performing content to boost conversions](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [20 new articles to be published this week](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Covering backlog from last week and this week's content](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Aiming for 10-15 articles published in next few days, remainder early next week](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Easter-related topics included in content plan](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Current metrics: clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Need to add conversion tracking (demo bookings, free trials)](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Action: Work with G to set up conversion tracking in Google Analytics/HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Total impressions \~180k (135k from Grotex, 45k from Firework articles)](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Firework articles improved from 29k to 48k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Clicks: Internal articles \~300/week, Grotex articles \~99/week](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Top Performing Content

  - [Last 3 months top articles:](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
    1.  "Short form video" - 2000 clicks
    2.  "Vertical video" - 1200 clicks
    3.  "Live-stream shopping" - \~200 clicks
  - [Action: Create specific lead magnets for top 2 performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

### Content Initiatives

1.  New articles: Significant growth in impressions (140k) and clicks (750)
2.  Content refresh: Updating old content, resulting in \~100 clicks from previously zero-performing articles

  - [Action: Set up meeting with G to discuss implementation](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

### Website Improvements

  - [ICE targeting implemented to gather visitor information without form fills](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [New blog design updated by Cameron](https://fathom.video/share/BE124aYGfnfYuyvpopgzpMvnwm3voJsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
